narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-F (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,291 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
